reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool to fetch authenticated username but encountered OAuth token retrieval failure on proxy side
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token fetch fails with "502: Failed to fetch access token" error - The agent successfully requested and obtained GitHub account access permissions, but when attempting to make the GitHub API call to retrieve the authenticated user's username, the proxy returned a 502 Bad Gateway error indicating the OAuth token could not be fetched. The response does not contain a GitHub username as required by the test.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully, sidebar visible with agent list
Found and clicked the "QA-20260505-183510-tebh" agent in sidebar — Agent opened successfully, displayed agent home page with status "idle"
Verified agent status — Status indicator showed "idle", meeting the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted successfully, agent transitioned to "working" status
Granted GitHub account access from first request card — Selected GitHub account checkbox and clicked "Allow Access (1)" button, approved permission dialog
Approved first GitHub API request (GET /user) — Clicked Allow button and selected "Allow Once" from permission dialog
Approved second GitHub API request for raw user response — Clicked Allow button and selected "Allow Once" from permission dialog
Approved third GitHub API request (Verbose GitHub API call) — Clicked Allow button and selected "Allow Once" from permission dialog
Granted GitHub account access from second request card — Selected GitHub account checkbox and clicked "Allow Access (1)" button after initial 502 error, approved permission dialog
Approved retry GitHub API request — Clicked Allow button and selected "Allow Once" from permission dialog
Waited for agent response completion — Agent completed after 1m 34s, status returned to "idle"

Verified final response — Response does not include GitHub username; instead contains error message: "I can't retrieve your GitHub username — the proxy keeps returning `502: Failed to fetch access token` even after re-granting access. The connected account is registered (ID `98aaa508-…`), but the OAuth token fetch is failing on the proxy side."
bugs: GitHub OAuth token fetch fails with "502: Failed to fetch access token" error - The agent successfully requested and obtained GitHub account access permissions, but when attempting to make the GitHub API call to retrieve the authenticated user's username, the proxy returned a 502 Bad Gateway error indicating the OAuth token could not be fetched. The response does not contain a GitHub username as required by the test.
